name: Fettuccine with Scallops and Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 lb Sea scallops, rinsed, patted dry
2 tbsp Unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan of boiling salted water, cook peas for 3-5 minutes (fresh may take slightly longer). Drain well.
2. In a kettle of boiling salted water, cook the pasta until al dente, drain, and transfer to a large skillet.
3. Meanwhile, arrange scallops in a steamer over boiling water, season with salt and pepper, and steam covered for 2-3 minutes, or until just cooked through.
4. To the pasta, add butter, peas, and season with salt and pepper to taste. Heat mixture through over low heat, tossing well.
5. Add scallops and saffron butter sauce; toss well. Serve hot.
